headline: CF Industries Faces Pricing Scrutiny As Stock Trades Above Valuations
summary: CF Industries Holdings (NYSE:CF) faces accusations of fertilizer price gouging from Senator Josh Hawley tied to sharp urea price moves during geopolitical supply disruptions. Lawmakers have issued direct inquiries to CF Industries about its pricing practices and market conduct. The company is cited in connection with ongoing Department of Justice antitrust investigations into fertilizer industry competition. These developments raise legal and reputational questions that could influence...

headline: Investing.com鈥檚 stocks of the week
summary: Investing.com -- With the Middle East conflict continuing, investors have had to contend with another volatile week. The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has significantly impacted oil markets and other sectors.
